Evil-WinRM shell v3.5

Warning: Remote path completions is disabled due to ruby limitation: quoting_detection_proc() function is unimplemented on this machine

Data: For more information, check Evil-WinRM GitHub: https://github.com/Hackplayers/evil-winrm#Remote-path-completion

Info: Establishing connection to remote endpoint: dc01.contoso.local

*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\Users\Administrator\Documents> whoami
contoso\administrator
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\Users\Administrator\Documents> hostname
DC01
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\Users\Administrator\Documents> Get-ADUser -Filter * | Select-Object SamAccountName | Out-String
administrator
guest
krbtgt
svc-backup
jdoe
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\Users\Administrator\Documents> exit
Info: Exiting with code 0
